class.name: TrainBuffCoupl
class.brief_description: Handles train buffers and coupling mechanisms.
class.description: This class manages the physical properties and logic for train couplers and buffers. It allows configuring the stiffness, damping, and tolerance limits for both the buffer (compression) and coupler (tension) components. It also handles the connection capabilities such as air pipes, electric cables, and control signals.

method.name: couple
method.description: Attempts to couple the train to a neighboring vehicle.

method.name: decouple
method.description: Decouples the train from the attached vehicle.
